title: Red Snapper Velvety Delight
description: A nutty, gooey Vietnamese dish featuring red snapper with a deglazed base that’s both show-off and fodmap-friendly.

ingredients.name: Oyster sauce
ingredients.amount: 1/4 cup (60 ml), optional for extra richness

instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Season red snapper fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat oil in a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Add garlic, shallots, and sugar; cook until fragrant, about 2 minutes.
Deglaze the pan with jasmine rice wine, scraping up any browned bits on the bottom of the pan.
Reduce heat to medium, add fish sauce and oyster sauce if using, then stir in red snapper fillets. Cook for about 5 minutes per side or until they reach desired doneness.
Serve hot as a main course with a flavorful broth or steamed vegetables on the side.
